style_prefix: pixel art game sprite, pure black background (#000000), neon synthwave post-apocalyptic sci-fi, deep violet and indigo base with glowing magenta / cyan / amber yellow accents, detailed shading with rim light, soft glow halo around neon elements, chunky pixel highlights, gradient dithering on volumes, metallic material reads, crisp readable silhouette centered in frame, no text, no watermark, no border frame, Chrono Trigger meets Hyper Light Drifter meets Signalis
